response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and deep systems-level expertise, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks focused, recent, or demonstrable experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE tooling, Spring ecosystem, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role. His strengths lie in diverse languages and open-source tooling, but not in the specific domain of enterprise IDE development.
strengths: Proven experience with Java and JVM-related projects in past roles
Strong background in developer tooling, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or prominent experience with Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate in enterprise contexts
Lacks demonstrable work on IDE internals, language servers, or JVM tooling pipelines
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not Java/Kotlin IDE development
